Description

The gc_ionization_energy_limit variable records response to the prompt, "Maximum energy provided from detector to ionize certain compounds".
473) gc_ionization_energy_unit ¶
LabelUnit of gc_ionization_energy
Datatypestring
Description

The gc_ionization_energy_unit variable records response to the prompt, "Unit of gc_ionization_energy".

Technology Metadata/Olfactory perception3 elements

474) odorant ¶
LabelName of unique odorants that are utilized for the given technology protocol (Each card in the olfactory battery uses exactly 3 unique odors. The participant is asked to rate the intensity of the 3 odors, identify the 3 odors, and then discriminate between pairs of the 3 odors.)
Datatypestring
Description

The odorant variable records response to the prompt, "Name of unique odorants that are utilized for the given technology protocol (Each card in the olfactory battery uses exactly 3 unique odors. The participant is asked to rate the intensity of the 3 odors, identify the 3 odors, and then discriminate between pairs of the 3 odors.)".

Values for this variable are strings that are restricted to the list of 18 permissible string values.

Enumeration
Grape Grape
Smoke Smoke
Soap Soap
Dirt Dirt
Menthol Menthol
Peach Peach
Pineapple Pineapple
Bubblegum Bubblegum
Clove Clove
Strawberry Strawberry
Leather Leather
Banana Banana
Lilac Lilac
Lemon Lemon
Chocolate Chocolate
Rose Rose
Coffee Coffee
Orange Orange
475) odorant_test_min ¶
LabelMinimum or 'worst' possible performance for the given technology (odorant test) (Each technology has a lower bound and upper bound on how the participant can score. For example, the intensity of any given odor can be rated between 0 (nothing perceived) to 10 (strongest odor imaginable) and thus the min of the average across 3 odors is 0 and the max is 10.)
Datatypestring
Description

The odorant_test_min variable records response to the prompt, "Minimum or 'worst' possible performance for the given technology (odorant test) (Each technology has a lower bound and upper bound on how the participant can score. For example, the intensity of any given odor can be rated between 0 (nothing perceived) to 10 (strongest odor imaginable) and thus the min of the average across 3 odors is 0 and the max is 10.)".
476) odorant_test_max ¶
LabelMaximum or 'best' possible performance for the given technology (odorant test)
Datatypestring
Description

The odorant_test_max variable records response to the prompt, "Maximum or 'best' possible performance for the given technology (odorant test)".

Technology Metadata/Mechanical detection15 elements

477) dna_motor_particle ¶
LabelThe material used to fabricate the DNA motor (Used by Rolosense technology)
Datatypestring
Description

The dna_motor_particle variable records response to the prompt, "The material used to fabricate the DNA motor (Used by Rolosense technology)".
478) dna_motor_diameter ¶
LabelDiameter of the DNA motor (Used by Rolosense technology)
Datatypestring
Description

The dna_motor_diameter variable records response to the prompt, "Diameter of the DNA motor (Used by Rolosense technology)".
479) dna_motor_diameter_unit ¶
LabelUnit of dna_motor_diameter (Used by Rolosense technology)
Datatypestring
Description

The dna_motor_diameter_unit variable records response to the prompt, "Unit of dna_motor_diameter (Used by Rolosense technology)".
480) dna_motor_particle_aptamer_density ¶
LabelDensity of the partical aptamer on the DNA motor (Used by Rolosense technology)
Datatypestring
Description

The dna_motor_particle_aptamer_density variable records response to the prompt, "Density of the partical aptamer on the DNA motor (Used by Rolosense technology)".
481) dna_motor_particle_aptamer_density_unit ¶
LabelUnit of dna_motor_particle_aptamer_density (Used by Rolosense technology)
Datatypestring
Description

The dna_motor_particle_aptamer_density_unit variable records response to the prompt, "Unit of dna_motor_particle_aptamer_density (Used by Rolosense technology)".
482) dna_motor_incubation_time ¶
LabelTime that the DNA motors with aptamers are incubated with the virus particles (Used by Rolosense technology)
Datatypestring
Description

The dna_motor_incubation_time variable records response to the prompt, "Time that the DNA motors with aptamers are incubated with the virus particles (Used by Rolosense technology)".
483) dna_motor_incubation_time_unit ¶
LabelUnit of dna_motor_incubation_time (Used by Rolosense technology)
Datatypestring
Description

The dna_motor_incubation_time_unit variable records response to the prompt, "Unit of dna_motor_incubation_time (Used by Rolosense technology)".
484) dna_motor_trajectory ¶
LabelIdentification of a single DNA motor (Used by Rolosense technology, example: dna_motor_trajectory of 1 means its DNA motor 1 tracked throughout all of the frames)
Datatypestring
Description

The dna_motor_trajectory variable records response to the prompt, "Identification of a single DNA motor (Used by Rolosense technology, example: dna_motor_trajectory of 1 means its DNA motor 1 tracked throughout all of the frames)".
485) dna_motor_frame ¶
LabelFrame number for which the DNA motor is tracked throughout the 30 minute Timelapse period. Each dna_motor_trajectory should have x and y positions for 361 frames. (Used by Rolosense technology)
Datatypestring
Description

The dna_motor_frame variable records response to the prompt, "Frame number for which the DNA motor is tracked throughout the 30 minute Timelapse period. Each dna_motor_trajectory should have x and y positions for 361 frames. (Used by Rolosense technology)".
486) dna_motor_x_position ¶
Labelx position of the DNA motor for the total frame number (Used by Rolosense technology)
Datatypestring
Description

The dna_motor_x_position variable records response to the prompt, "x position of the DNA motor for the total frame number (Used by Rolosense technology)".
487) dna_motor_y_position ¶
Labely position of the DNA motor for the total frame number (Used by Rolosense technology)
Datatypestring
Description

The dna_motor_y_position variable records response to the prompt, "y position of the DNA motor for the total frame number (Used by Rolosense technology)".
488) chip_surface_aptamer_density ¶
LabelDensity of the surfacer aptamer on chip (Used by Rolosense technology)
Datatypestring
Description

The chip_surface_aptamer_density variable records response to the prompt, "Density of the surfacer aptamer on chip (Used by Rolosense technology)".
489) chip_surface_aptamer_density_unit ¶
LabelUnit of chip_surface_aptamer_density (Used by Rolosense technology)
Datatypestring
Description

The chip_surface_aptamer_density_unit variable records response to the prompt, "Unit of chip_surface_aptamer_density (Used by Rolosense technology)".
490) chip_detection_time ¶
LabelDetection time for net displacement on chip (Used by Rolosense technology)
Datatypestring
Description

The chip_detection_time variable records response to the prompt, "Detection time for net displacement on chip (Used by Rolosense technology)".
491) chip_detection_time_unit ¶
LabelUnit of chip_detection_time (Used by Rolosense technology)
Datatypestring
Description

The chip_detection_time_unit variable records response to the prompt, "Unit of chip_detection_time (Used by Rolosense technology)".

PCR metadata39 elements

492) pcr_type ¶
LabelType of PCR method
Datatypestring
Description

The pcr_type variable records response to the prompt, "Type of PCR method".

Values for this variable are strings that are restricted to the list of 9 permissible string values.

Enumeration
qPCR qPCR
rt-qPCR rt-qPCR
ddPCR ddPCR
qiagen dPCR qiagen dPCR
fluidigm dPCR fluidigm dPCR
life technologies dPCR life technologies dPCR
raindance dPCR raindance dPCR
V2G-qPCR V2G-qPCR
LAMP LAMP
493) pcr_multipexed ¶
LabelIf PCR was multiplexed
Datatypestring
Description

The pcr_multipexed variable records response to the prompt, "If PCR was multiplexed".

Values for this variable are strings that are restricted to the list of 2 permissible string values.

Enumeration
Yes Yes
No No
494) pcr_nucleic_acid_type ¶
Labeltype of nucleic acid targeted in the assay
Datatypestring
Description

The pcr_nucleic_acid_type variable records response to the prompt, "type of nucleic acid targeted in the assay".

Values for this variable are strings that are restricted to the list of 2 permissible string values.

Enumeration
RNA RNA
DNA DNA
495) pcr_target_organism_name ¶
LabelNCBI organism name (example: SARS-CoV-2)
Datatypestring
Description

The pcr_target_organism_name variable records response to the prompt, "NCBI organism name (example: SARS-CoV-2)".
496) pcr_target_organism_taxonomy_id ¶
LabelNCBI taxonomy id for organism (example: 2697049)
Datatypestring
Description

The pcr_target_organism_taxonomy_id variable records response to the prompt, "NCBI taxonomy id for organism (example: 2697049)".
497) pcr_target_organism_subtype ¶
Labelsubtype of organism (example: H1N1 (for influenza))
Datatypestring
Description

The pcr_target_organism_subtype variable records response to the prompt, "subtype of organism (example: H1N1 (for influenza))".
498) pcr_target_refseq ¶
LabelGenBank reference sequence id (example: MN985325.1)
Datatypestring
Description

The pcr_target_refseq variable records response to the prompt, "GenBank reference sequence id (example: MN985325.1)".
499) pcr_target_gisaid_id ¶
LabelGISAID id reference sequence id (example: EPI_ISL_402124)
Datatypestring
Description

The pcr_target_gisaid_id variable records response to the prompt, "GISAID id reference sequence id (example: EPI_ISL_402124)".
500) pcr_target_organism_pango_lineage ¶
LabelPango lineage for SARS-CoV-2 variants (example: B.1.1.7)
Datatypestring
Description

The pcr_target_organism_pango_lineage variable records response to the prompt, "Pango lineage for SARS-CoV-2 variants (example: B.1.1.7)".
501) pcr_target_organism_who_label ¶
LabelWHO label for SARS-CoV-2 variants (example: Alpha)
Datatypestring
Description

The pcr_target_organism_who_label variable records response to the prompt, "WHO label for SARS-CoV-2 variants (example: Alpha)".
502) pcr_target_organism_gisaid_clade ¶
LabelGISAID clade for SARS-CoV-2 variants (example: GRY)
Datatypestring
Description

The pcr_target_organism_gisaid_clade variable records response to the prompt, "GISAID clade for SARS-CoV-2 variants (example: GRY)".
503) pcr_target_gene_name ¶
LabelNCBI or UniProt gene name (example: S)
Datatypestring
Description

The pcr_target_gene_name variable records response to the prompt, "NCBI or UniProt gene name (example: S)".
504) pcr_target_gene_id ¶
Labelunique identifier for the gene (example: a gene Ensemble ID)
Datatypestring
Description

The pcr_target_gene_id variable records response to the prompt, "unique identifier for the gene (example: a gene Ensemble ID)".
505) pcr_target_gene_region ¶
Labeldomain or subunit name (e.g. receptor binding domain)
Datatypestring
Description

The pcr_target_gene_region variable records response to the prompt, "domain or subunit name (e.g. receptor binding domain)".
506) pcr_target_chromosome ¶
Labelchromosome number (e.g. 1-22, X, Y for human)
Datatypestring
Description

The pcr_target_chromosome variable records response to the prompt, "chromosome number (e.g. 1-22, X, Y for human)".
507) forward_primer_id ¶
Labelunique identifier such as name, id, product name, or catalog number (example: 2019-nCoV_N1-F)
Datatypestring
Description

The forward_primer_id variable records response to the prompt, "unique identifier such as name, id, product name, or catalog number (example: 2019-nCoV_N1-F)".
508) forward_primer_sequence ¶
Label5' to 3' sequence of primer (example: 5'-GACCCCAAAATCAGCGAAAT-3')
Datatypestring
Description

The forward_primer_sequence variable records response to the prompt, "5' to 3' sequence of primer (example: 5'-GACCCCAAAATCAGCGAAAT-3')".
509) forward_primer_strand ¶
Labelprimer strand
Datatypestring
Description

The forward_primer_strand variable records response to the prompt, "primer strand".

Values for this variable are strings that are restricted to the list of 2 permissible string values.

Enumeration
Positive Positive
Negative Negative
510) forward_primer_genome_start ¶
Labelstarting position (1-based) of the primer in the genome reference sequence (example: 28287)
Datatypestring
Description

The forward_primer_genome_start variable records response to the prompt, "starting position (1-based) of the primer in the genome reference sequence (example: 28287)".
511) forward_primer_genome_end ¶
Labelending position (1-based) of the primer in the reference genome sequence (example: 28306)
Datatypestring
Description

The forward_primer_genome_end variable records response to the prompt, "ending position (1-based) of the primer in the reference genome sequence (example: 28306)".
512) reverse_primer_id ¶
Labelunique identifier such as name, id, product name, or catalog number (example: 2019-nCoV_N1-R)
Datatypestring
Description

The reverse_primer_id variable records response to the prompt, "unique identifier such as name, id, product name, or catalog number (example: 2019-nCoV_N1-R)".
513) reverse_primer_sequence ¶
Label5' to 3' sequence of primer (example: 5'-TCTGGTTACTGCCAGTTGAATCTG-3')
Datatypestring
Description

The reverse_primer_sequence variable records response to the prompt, "5' to 3' sequence of primer (example: 5'-TCTGGTTACTGCCAGTTGAATCTG-3')".
514) reverse_primer_strand ¶
Labelprimer strand
Datatypestring
Description

The reverse_primer_strand variable records response to the prompt, "primer strand".

Values for this variable are strings that are restricted to the list of 2 permissible string values.

Enumeration
Positive Positive
Negative Negative
515) reverse_primer_genome_start ¶
Labelstarting position (1-based) of the primer in the genome reference sequence (example: 28335)
Datatypestring
Description

The reverse_primer_genome_start variable records response to the prompt, "starting position (1-based) of the primer in the genome reference sequence (example: 28335)".
516) reverse_primer_genome_end ¶
Labelending position (1-based) of the primer in the reference genome sequence (example: 28358)
Datatypestring
Description

The reverse_primer_genome_end variable records response to the prompt, "ending position (1-based) of the primer in the reference genome sequence (example: 28358)".
517) primer_source ¶
Labelsupplier name, instrument for synthesis, or literature reference
Datatypestring
Description

The primer_source variable records response to the prompt, "supplier name, instrument for synthesis, or literature reference".
518) primer_lot_number ¶
Labellot number for primer
Datatypestring
Description

The primer_lot_number variable records response to the prompt, "lot number for primer".
519) primer_source_url ¶
LabelURL that links to vendors catalog page for this primer or pcr kit, or link to paper
Datatypestring
Description

The primer_source_url variable records response to the prompt, "URL that links to vendors catalog page for this primer or pcr kit, or link to paper".
520) probe_id ¶
Labelunique identifier such as name, id, product name, or catalog number (example: 2019-nCoV_N1-P)
Datatypestring
Description

The probe_id variable records response to the prompt, "unique identifier such as name, id, product name, or catalog number (example: 2019-nCoV_N1-P)".
521) probe_source ¶
Labelsuppler name, instrument for synthesis, or literature reference
Datatypestring
Description

The probe_source variable records response to the prompt, "suppler name, instrument for synthesis, or literature reference".
522) probe_source_url ¶
LabelURL that links to vendors catalog page for this probe or pcr kit
Datatypestring
Description

The probe_source_url variable records response to the prompt, "URL that links to vendors catalog page for this probe or pcr kit".
523) probe_lot_number ¶
Labellot number for probe
Datatypestring
Description

The probe_lot_number variable records response to the prompt, "lot number for probe".
524) probe_sequence ¶
Label5' to 3' sequence of probe with modifications separated by "-" (example: FAM-5'-ACCCCGCATTACGTTTGGTGGACC-3'-BHQ1)
Datatypestring
Description

The probe_sequence variable records response to the prompt, "5' to 3' sequence of probe with modifications separated by "-" (example: FAM-5'-ACCCCGCATTACGTTTGGTGGACC-3'-BHQ1)".
525) probe_genome_start ¶
Labelstarting position (1-based) of the probe in the genome reference sequence (example: 28309)
Datatypestring
Description

The probe_genome_start variable records response to the prompt, "starting position (1-based) of the probe in the genome reference sequence (example: 28309)".
526) probe_genome_end ¶
Labelending position (1-based) of the primer in the reference genome sequence (example: 28332)
Datatypestring
Description

The probe_genome_end variable records response to the prompt, "ending position (1-based) of the primer in the reference genome sequence (example: 28332)".
527) probe_reporter ¶
Labelname of the 5' fluorescent probe (example: FAM)
Datatypestring
Description

The probe_reporter variable records response to the prompt, "name of the 5' fluorescent probe (example: FAM)".
528) probe_quencher_internal ¶
Labelname of internal quencher (example: ZEN)
Datatypestring
Description

The probe_quencher_internal variable records response to the prompt, "name of internal quencher (example: ZEN)".
529) probe_quencher ¶
Labelname of 3' quencher (example: BHQ1)
Datatypestring
Description

The probe_quencher variable records response to the prompt, "name of 3' quencher (example: BHQ1)".
530) probe_minor_groove_binder ¶
Labelname of the 3' minor groove binder (example: MGB)
Datatypestring
Description

The probe_minor_groove_binder variable records response to the prompt, "name of the 3' minor groove binder (example: MGB)".

PCR11 elements

531) pcr_run_id ¶
Labelunique identifier for the PCR run
Datatypestring
Description

The pcr_run_id variable records response to the prompt, "unique identifier for the PCR run".
532) pcr_instrument ¶
Labelmaker and model of PCR instrument used for the assay
Datatypestring
Description

The pcr_instrument variable records response to the prompt, "maker and model of PCR instrument used for the assay".
533) pcr_cycle_threshold ¶
Labelcalculated Cq value based on threshold and standards
Datatypestring
Description

The pcr_cycle_threshold variable records response to the prompt, "calculated Cq value based on threshold and standards".
534) pcr_count ¶
Labelcalculated count value based on threshold and standards
Datatypestring
Description

The pcr_count variable records response to the prompt, "calculated count value based on threshold and standards".
535) pcr_concentration ¶
Labelcalculated copies per microliter of reaction for dPCR
Datatypestring
Description

The pcr_concentration variable records response to the prompt, "calculated copies per microliter of reaction for dPCR".
536) pcr_indication ¶
Labelindication of positive or negative result for the target
Datatypestring
Description

The pcr_indication variable records response to the prompt, "indication of positive or negative result for the target".

Values for this variable are strings that are restricted to the list of 2 permissible string values.

Enumeration
Positive Positive
Negative Negative
537) pcr_standard_type ¶
Labelindication of whether the well acts as a standard. If so, which type.
Datatypestring
Description

The pcr_standard_type variable records response to the prompt, "indication of whether the well acts as a standard. If so, which type.".

Values for this variable are strings that are restricted to the list of 3 permissible string values.

Enumeration
NTC NTC
Count Standard Count Standard
Negative Negative
538) pcr_standard_count ¶
Labelif well is a count standard, known count value
Datatypestring
Description

The pcr_standard_count variable records response to the prompt, "if well is a count standard, known count value".
539) assay_date ¶
Labeldate of assay performed (example: 2021-01-01)
Datatypestring
Description

The assay_date variable records response to the prompt, "date of assay performed (example: 2021-01-01)".
540) well_id ¶
Labelwell location (example: A1)
Datatypestring
Description

The well_id variable records response to the prompt, "well location (example: A1)".
541) notes ¶
Labelnotes about this sample or assay
Datatypestring
Description

The notes variable records response to the prompt, "notes about this sample or assay".

Sample41 elements

542) sample_id ¶
LabelUnique identifier for a sample
Datatypestring
Description

The sample_id variable records response to the prompt, "Unique identifier for a sample".
543) sample_group ¶
LabelIdentifier to group a set of samples (example: Omicron samples)
Datatypestring
Description

The sample_group variable records response to the prompt, "Identifier to group a set of samples (example: Omicron samples)".
544) vqa_box_id ¶
LabelUnique identifier for a VQA panel, e.g., a LOD-Panel or Challenge-panel
Datatypestring
Description

The vqa_box_id variable records response to the prompt, "Unique identifier for a VQA panel, e.g., a LOD-Panel or Challenge-panel".
545) sample_media ¶
LabelMedia used to prepare the spiked sample (example: pooled saliva)
Datatypestring
Description

The sample_media variable records response to the prompt, "Media used to prepare the spiked sample (example: pooled saliva)".
546) sample_media_id ¶
LabelCatalog number, batch number, etc. for the sample media
Datatypestring
Description

The sample_media_id variable records response to the prompt, "Catalog number, batch number, etc. for the sample media".
547) sample_media_source_name ¶
LabelName of the sample media given by the provider
Datatypestring
Description

The sample_media_source_name variable records response to the prompt, "Name of the sample media given by the provider".
548) sample_media_source ¶
LabelEntity that provided the sample media (example: Lee Biosolutions)
Datatypestring
Description

The sample_media_source variable records response to the prompt, "Entity that provided the sample media (example: Lee Biosolutions)".
549) sample_media_source_url ¶
LabelURL of the sample media provider (example: https://www.leebio.com/product/1769/saliva-pooled-human-donors-991-05-p-prec)
Datatypestring
Description

The sample_media_source_url variable records response to the prompt, "URL of the sample media provider (example: https://www.leebio.com/product/1769/saliva-pooled-human-donors-991-05-p-prec)".
550) sample_concentration ¶
LabelConcentation of target analyte in the sample
Datatypestring
Description

The sample_concentration variable records response to the prompt, "Concentation of target analyte in the sample".
551) sample_concentration_unit ¶
LabelUnit of the target analyte concentration (example: copies/ml)
Datatypestring
Description

The sample_concentration_unit variable records response to the prompt, "Unit of the target analyte concentration (example: copies/ml)".
552) sample_concentration_reference_gene ¶
LabelThe reference gene used for viral samples (example: ORF1a)
Datatypestring
Description

The sample_concentration_reference_gene variable records response to the prompt, "The reference gene used for viral samples (example: ORF1a)".
553) sample_concentration_measured ¶
LabelThe measured concentation of target analyte in the sample (for verification)
Datatypestring
Description

The sample_concentration_measured variable records response to the prompt, "The measured concentation of target analyte in the sample (for verification)".
554) sample_concentration_measured_unit ¶
LabelThe unit of sample concentration measured (example: copies/ml)
Datatypestring
Description

The sample_concentration_measured_unit variable records response to the prompt, "The unit of sample concentration measured (example: copies/ml)".
555) sample_concentration_measured_reference_gene ¶
LabelThe reference gene used for viral samples (example: ORF1a)
Datatypestring
Description

The sample_concentration_measured_reference_gene variable records response to the prompt, "The reference gene used for viral samples (example: ORF1a)".
675) sample_collect_date ¶
LabelThe date of sample collection; for composite samples, specify the date on which sample collection began
Datatypedate
Description

The sample_collect_date variable records response to the prompt, "The date of sample collection; for composite samples, specify the date on which sample collection began".
676) sample_collect_time ¶
LabelThe local time of sample collection; for composite samples, specify the time at which sample collection began
Datatypetime
Description

The sample_collect_time variable records response to the prompt, "The local time of sample collection; for composite samples, specify the time at which sample collection began".
677) time_zone ¶
LabelCurrent local time zone corresponding to the time specified in 'sample_collect_time', represented as a UTC time offset (e.g., UTC-06:00) (time zone (UTC-[hh]:[mm]))
Datatypestring
Description

The time_zone variable records response to the prompt, "Current local time zone corresponding to the time specified in 'sample_collect_time', represented as a UTC time offset (e.g., UTC-06:00) (time zone (UTC-[hh]:[mm]))".
678) flow_rate ¶
LabelWastewater volumetric flow rate at the sample collection location over the 24-hr period during which the sample was collected. If only an instantaneous flow measurement is available, it may be reported in units of million gallons per day.
Datatypestring
Description

The flow_rate variable records response to the prompt, "Wastewater volumetric flow rate at the sample collection location over the 24-hr period during which the sample was collected. If only an instantaneous flow measurement is available, it may be reported in units of million gallons per day.".
679) ph ¶
LabelpH of wastewater sample (if sludge, pH of influent at time of collection)
Datatypestring
Description

The ph variable records response to the prompt, "pH of wastewater sample (if sludge, pH of influent at time of collection)".
680) conductivity ¶
LabelSpecific conductivity of wastewater sample (if sludge, conductivity of influent at time of collection)
Datatypestring
Description

The conductivity variable records response to the prompt, "Specific conductivity of wastewater sample (if sludge, conductivity of influent at time of collection)".
681) water_salinity ¶
LabelQuantity of dissolved salts (NaCl, Mg2SO4, KNO3, NaHCO3), in parts per thousand
Datatypestring
Description

The water_salinity variable records response to the prompt, "Quantity of dissolved salts (NaCl, Mg2SO4, KNO3, NaHCO3), in parts per thousand".
682) tss ¶
LabelTotal suspended solids of raw (or, if unavailable, post-grit removal) wastewater
Datatypestring
Description

The tss variable records response to the prompt, "Total suspended solids of raw (or, if unavailable, post-grit removal) wastewater".
683) collection_water_temp ¶
LabelSample temperature at time of collection
Datatypestring
Description

The collection_water_temp variable records response to the prompt, "Sample temperature at time of collection".
684) location_air_temp ¶
LabelTemperature of the air at the location and time of sampling, in C
Datatypestring
Description

The location_air_temp variable records response to the prompt, "Temperature of the air at the location and time of sampling, in C".
685) location_air_humidity ¶
LabelHumidity of the air at the location and time of sampling, in %
Datatypestring
Description

The location_air_humidity variable records response to the prompt, "Humidity of the air at the location and time of sampling, in %".
686) sample_cbod5 ¶
Label5-day carbonacious biochemical oxygen demand (mg/L)
Datatypestring
Description

The sample_cbod5 variable records response to the prompt, "5-day carbonacious biochemical oxygen demand (mg/L)".
687) sample_turbidity ¶
LabelTurbidity (light scattering property of water that results in loss of transparency) of the sample, in nephelometric turbidity units (ntu)
Datatypestring
Description

The sample_turbidity variable records response to the prompt, "Turbidity (light scattering property of water that results in loss of transparency) of the sample, in nephelometric turbidity units (ntu)".
688) equiv_sewage_amt ¶
LabelEquivalent unconcentrated volume of wastewater or mass of sludge in PCR reaction (mL wastewater or g sludge)
Datatypestring
Description

The equiv_sewage_amt variable records response to the prompt, "Equivalent unconcentrated volume of wastewater or mass of sludge in PCR reaction (mL wastewater or g sludge)".
689) sample_dissolved_oxygen ¶
LabelAmount of oxygen dissolved in sample, in mg/L
Datatypestring
Description

The sample_dissolved_oxygen variable records response to the prompt, "Amount of oxygen dissolved in sample, in mg/L".
690) composite_start_date ¶
LabelComposite start date
Datatypedate
Description

The composite_start_date variable records response to the prompt, "Composite start date".
691) composite_start_time ¶
LabelComposite start time
Datatypetime
Description

The composite_start_time variable records response to the prompt, "Composite start time".
692) composite_end_date ¶
LabelComposite end date
Datatypedate
Description

The composite_end_date variable records response to the prompt, "Composite end date".
693) composite_end_time ¶
LabelComposite end time
Datatypetime
Description

The composite_end_time variable records response to the prompt, "Composite end time".
694) composite_aliqots_attempted ¶
LabelNumber of Aliquots Attempted per Composite (Number of aliquots collected for composite sample)
Datatypestring
Description

The composite_aliqots_attempted variable records response to the prompt, "Number of Aliquots Attempted per Composite (Number of aliquots collected for composite sample)".
695) composite_aliqots_obtained ¶
LabelAliquot Number (Aliquot number for composite sample (this question to be asked based upon number of aliquots listed above))
Datatypestring
Description

The composite_aliqots_obtained variable records response to the prompt, "Aliquot Number (Aliquot number for composite sample (this question to be asked based upon number of aliquots listed above))".
696) composite_aliqots_time ¶
LabelAliquot Time (Time when the aliquot was collected (this question to be asked based upon number of aliquots listed above))
Datatypetime
Description

The composite_aliqots_time variable records response to the prompt, "Aliquot Time (Time when the aliquot was collected (this question to be asked based upon number of aliquots listed above))".
697) composite_aliqots_volume ¶
LabelAliquot Volume (Aliquot volume collected at that time (mL) (this question to be asked based upon number of aliquots listed above))
Datatypestring
Description

The composite_aliqots_volume variable records response to the prompt, "Aliquot Volume (Aliquot volume collected at that time (mL) (this question to be asked based upon number of aliquots listed above))".
698) sodium_thiosulfate_added ¶
LabelSodium thiosulfate added (Added to Neutralize Chlorine Residua)
Datatypestring
Description

The sodium_thiosulfate_added variable records response to the prompt, "Sodium thiosulfate added (Added to Neutralize Chlorine Residua)".

Values for this variable are strings that are restricted to the list of 2 permissible string values.

Enumeration
Yes Yes
No No
699) concentration_of_sodium_thiosulfate ¶
LabelConcentration of sodium thiosulfate solution (Concentrated solution of sodium thiosulfate to minimize dilution from aliquot added to sample bottle (100 g/L usually))
Datatypestring
Description

The concentration_of_sodium_thiosulfate variable records response to the prompt, "Concentration of sodium thiosulfate solution (Concentrated solution of sodium thiosulfate to minimize dilution from aliquot added to sample bottle (100 g/L usually))".
700) volume_of_sodium_thiosulfate ¶
LabelVolume of sodium thiosulfate solution added (Volume of sodium thiosulfate solution added to bottle (0.5 ml or 1.0 ml depending upon sample bottle size)0)
Datatypestring
Description

The volume_of_sodium_thiosulfate variable records response to the prompt, "Volume of sodium thiosulfate solution added (Volume of sodium thiosulfate solution added to bottle (0.5 ml or 1.0 ml depending upon sample bottle size)0)".
701) lab_id ¶
LabelAn ID assigned to a testing lab. It must be unique across labs used for this NWSS reporting jurisdiction's testing. If the same lab is used across multiple NWSS reporting jurisdictions, each NWSS reporting jurisdiction may assign that lab a different lab ID. (jurisdiction id (a string 20 characters or less, containing only numbers, English alphabetic characters, underscores, and hyphens; white space is not allowed))
Datatypestring
Description

The lab_id variable records response to the prompt, "An ID assigned to a testing lab. It must be unique across labs used for this NWSS reporting jurisdiction's testing. If the same lab is used across multiple NWSS reporting jurisdictions, each NWSS reporting jurisdiction may assign that lab a different lab ID. (jurisdiction id (a string 20 characters or less, containing only numbers, English alphabetic characters, underscores, and hyphens; white space is not allowed))".

Target9 elements

556) target_organism_name ¶
LabelNCBI organism name (example: SARS-CoV-2)
Datatypestring
Description

The target_organism_name variable records response to the prompt, "NCBI organism name (example: SARS-CoV-2)".
557) target_organism_taxonomy_id ¶
LabelNCBI taxonomy id for organism (example: 2697049)
Datatypestring
Description

The target_organism_taxonomy_id variable records response to the prompt, "NCBI taxonomy id for organism (example: 2697049)".
558) isolate_name ¶
LabelName of the isolate (example: hCoV-19/USA/WA1/2020)
Datatypestring
Description

The isolate_name variable records response to the prompt, "Name of the isolate (example: hCoV-19/USA/WA1/2020)".
559) target_organism_subtype ¶
LabelSubtype of organism (example (Influenza): H1N1)
Datatypestring
Description

The target_organism_subtype variable records response to the prompt, "Subtype of organism (example (Influenza): H1N1)".
560) gisaid_id ¶
LabelGISAID isolate id of the original isolate (example: EPI_ISL_751801)
Datatypestring
Description

The gisaid_id variable records response to the prompt, "GISAID isolate id of the original isolate (example: EPI_ISL_751801)".
561) gisaid_clade ¶
LabelGISAID clade for SARS-CoV-2 variant (example: GRY)
Datatypestring
Description

The gisaid_clade variable records response to the prompt, "GISAID clade for SARS-CoV-2 variant (example: GRY)".
562) nucleotide_db_id ¶
LabelNucleotide Sequence Database id, e.g., GenBank or ENA id of the original isolate (example: MN985325.1)
Datatypestring
Description

The nucleotide_db_id variable records response to the prompt, "Nucleotide Sequence Database id, e.g., GenBank or ENA id of the original isolate (example: MN985325.1)".
563) pango_lineage ¶
LabelPango lineage for SARS-CoV-2 variant (example: B.1.1.7)
Datatypestring
Description

The pango_lineage variable records response to the prompt, "Pango lineage for SARS-CoV-2 variant (example: B.1.1.7)".
564) who_label ¶
LabelWHO label for SARS-CoV-2 variant (example: Alpha)
Datatypestring
Description

The who_label variable records response to the prompt, "WHO label for SARS-CoV-2 variant (example: Alpha)".

Sample/Antigen13 elements

565) antigen_name ¶
LabelUniProt preferred protein name (example: Spike glycoprotein)
Datatypestring
Description

The antigen_name variable records response to the prompt, "UniProt preferred protein name (example: Spike glycoprotein)".
566) antigen_id ¶
LabelProtein Sequence Database id, e.g., UniProt accession number or NCBI GenPept id (examples: P0DTC2|YP_009724390.1)
Datatypestring
Description

The antigen_id variable records response to the prompt, "Protein Sequence Database id, e.g., UniProt accession number or NCBI GenPept id (examples: P0DTC2|YP_009724390.1)".
567) antigen_sequence ¶
LabelProtein sequence if protein sequence database id is unavailable
Datatypestring
Description

The antigen_sequence variable records response to the prompt, "Protein sequence if protein sequence database id is unavailable".
568) antigen_nterminal_tag ¶
LabelName of tag attached to N-terminal (example: HIS)
Datatypestring
Description

The antigen_nterminal_tag variable records response to the prompt, "Name of tag attached to N-terminal (example: HIS)".
569) antigen_cterminal_tag ¶
LabelName of tag attached to C-terminal (example: HIS)
Datatypestring
Description

The antigen_cterminal_tag variable records response to the prompt, "Name of tag attached to C-terminal (example: HIS)".
570) antigen_region ¶
LabelDomain or subunit name (examples: S1|Receptor Binding Domain)
Datatypestring
Description

The antigen_region variable records response to the prompt, "Domain or subunit name (examples: S1|Receptor Binding Domain)".
571) antigen_region_start ¶
LabelStart residue number of region (example: 16)
Datatypestring
Description

The antigen_region_start variable records response to the prompt, "Start residue number of region (example: 16)".
572) antigen_region_end ¶
LabelEnd residue number of region (example: 685)
Datatypestring
Description

The antigen_region_end variable records response to the prompt, "End residue number of region (example: 685)".
573) antigen_expression_system ¶
LabelSystem used to express protein
Datatypestring
Description

The antigen_expression_system variable records response to the prompt, "System used to express protein".
574) antigen_formulation ¶
LabelFormulation of antigen (example: Lyophilized from sterile PBS, pH 7.4.)
Datatypestring
Description

The antigen_formulation variable records response to the prompt, "Formulation of antigen (example: Lyophilized from sterile PBS, pH 7.4.)".
575) antigen_source ¶
LabelSupplier of antigen or publication (example: Sino Biological)
Datatypestring
Description

The antigen_source variable records response to the prompt, "Supplier of antigen or publication (example: Sino Biological)".
577) antigen_concentration ¶
LabelProtein concentration (example: 1.0)
Datatypestring
Description

The antigen_concentration variable records response to the prompt, "Protein concentration (example: 1.0)".
578) antigen_concentration_unit ¶
LabelUnit of protein concentration (example: nM)
Datatypestring
Description

The antigen_concentration_unit variable records response to the prompt, "Unit of protein concentration (example: nM)".

Sampe/Antigen1 element

576) antigen_source_url ¶
LabelURL of supplier catalog page or publication DOI link (example: https://www.sinobiological.com/recombinant-proteins/2019-ncov-cov-spike-40591-v08h)
Datatypestring
Description

The antigen_source_url variable records response to the prompt, "URL of supplier catalog page or publication DOI link (example: https://www.sinobiological.com/recombinant-proteins/2019-ncov-cov-spike-40591-v08h)".

Sample/VQA panel19 elements

579) virus_sample_id ¶
LabelIdentifier for virus sample, for VQA panels this is the QR code, for BEI the catalog number (examples: XXXX-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX (VQA panel), NR-52286 (BEI Resources))
Datatypestring
Description

The virus_sample_id variable records response to the prompt, "Identifier for virus sample, for VQA panels this is the QR code, for BEI the catalog number (examples: XXXX-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX (VQA panel), NR-52286 (BEI Resources))".
580) virus_shortname ¶
LabelShort label on sample tube (example: WA.1)
Datatypestring
Description

The virus_shortname variable records response to the prompt, "Short label on sample tube (example: WA.1)".
581) virus_batch_number ¶
LabelBatch and or/lot number of virus sample
Datatypestring
Description

The virus_batch_number variable records response to the prompt, "Batch and or/lot number of virus sample".
582) virus_sample_formulation ¶
LabelFormulation of virus sample (example: Strain diluted in cell culture media (DMEM + 1% FBS + 10mM HEPES + 50 units/ml Penicillin and 50 ug/ml Streptomycin).)
Datatypestring
Description

The virus_sample_formulation variable records response to the prompt, "Formulation of virus sample (example: Strain diluted in cell culture media (DMEM + 1% FBS + 10mM HEPES + 50 units/ml Penicillin and 50 ug/ml Streptomycin).)".
583) virus_sample_source ¶
LabelProvider from where the inactivated virus sample was procured from (examples: UCSD|BEI Resources|ATCC)
Datatypestring
Description

The virus_sample_source variable records response to the prompt, "Provider from where the inactivated virus sample was procured from (examples: UCSD|BEI Resources|ATCC)".
584) virus_sample_source_url ¶
LabelURL of supplier catalog page or publication DOI link (example: https://www.beiresources.org/Catalog/animalviruses/NR-52281.aspx)
Datatypestring
Description

The virus_sample_source_url variable records response to the prompt, "URL of supplier catalog page or publication DOI link (example: https://www.beiresources.org/Catalog/animalviruses/NR-52281.aspx)".
585) virus_source ¶
LabelSource of the live virus (examples: BEI Resources, UCSD)
Datatypestring
Description

The virus_source variable records response to the prompt, "Source of the live virus (examples: BEI Resources, UCSD)".
586) virus_location ¶
LabelLocation where the virus sample was collected
Datatypestring
Description

The virus_location variable records response to the prompt, "Location where the virus sample was collected".
587) virus_sample_type ¶
LabelType of virus sample (example: inactivated virus)
Datatypestring
Description

The virus_sample_type variable records response to the prompt, "Type of virus sample (example: inactivated virus)".

Values for this variable are strings that are restricted to the list of 3 permissible string values.

Enumeration
inactivated virus inactivated virus
live virus live virus
pseudovirus pseudovirus
588) virus_sample_inactivation_method ¶
LabelMethod of virus inactivation (example: heat)
Datatypestring
Description

The virus_sample_inactivation_method variable records response to the prompt, "Method of virus inactivation (example: heat)".

Values for this variable are strings that are restricted to the list of 3 permissible string values.

Enumeration
UV UV
heat heat
Gamma-irradiated Gamma-irradiated
589) virus_sample_concentration ¶
LabelConcentration of virus (example: 1.48E+10)
Datatypestring
Description

The virus_sample_concentration variable records response to the prompt, "Concentration of virus (example: 1.48E+10)".
590) virus_sample_concentration_unit ¶
LabelUnit of virus_sample_concentration
Datatypestring
Description

The virus_sample_concentration_unit variable records response to the prompt, "Unit of virus_sample_concentration".
591) virus_sample_concentration_reference_gene ¶
LabelReference gene used to determine concentration of virus (example: N)
Datatypestring
Description

The virus_sample_concentration_reference_gene variable records response to the prompt, "Reference gene used to determine concentration of virus (example: N)".
592) virus_sample_genome_equivalents ¶
LabelGenome equivalents in virus sample (example: 4.9E+09)
Datatypestring
Description

The virus_sample_genome_equivalents variable records response to the prompt, "Genome equivalents in virus sample (example: 4.9E+09)".
593) virus_sample_genome_equivalents_unit ¶
LabelUnit of virus_sample_genome_equivalents (example: copies/mL)
Datatypestring
Description

The virus_sample_genome_equivalents_unit variable records response to the prompt, "Unit of virus_sample_genome_equivalents (example: copies/mL)".
594) virus_sample_genome_equivalents_reference_gene ¶
LabelReference gene used to determine genome equivalents (example: ORF1a)
Datatypestring
Description

The virus_sample_genome_equivalents_reference_gene variable records response to the prompt, "Reference gene used to determine genome equivalents (example: ORF1a)".
595) virus_preinactivation_tcid50 ¶
LabelTissue Culture Infectious Dose 50% (TCID50) endpoint is the 50% infectious endpoint in cell culture. The TCID50 is the dilution of virus that under the conditions of the assay can be expected to infect 50% of the culture vessels inoculated. (example: 2E+07)
Datatypestring
Description

The virus_preinactivation_tcid50 variable records response to the prompt, "Tissue Culture Infectious Dose 50% (TCID50) endpoint is the 50% infectious endpoint in cell culture. The TCID50 is the dilution of virus that under the conditions of the assay can be expected to infect 50% of the culture vessels inoculated. (example: 2E+07)".
596) virus_preinactivation_tcid50_unit ¶
LabelUnit of virus_preinactivation_tcid50 (example: TCID50/mL)
Datatypestring
Description

The virus_preinactivation_tcid50_unit variable records response to the prompt, "Unit of virus_preinactivation_tcid50 (example: TCID50/mL)".
597) virus_sample_grow_cell_line ¶
LabelCell line used for producing virus (example: Caco2)
Datatypestring
Description

The virus_sample_grow_cell_line variable records response to the prompt, "Cell line used for producing virus (example: Caco2)".

Sample/Antibody28 elements

598) neutralizing_antibody_id ¶
LabelUnique identifier or catalog number of antibody given by supplier
Datatypestring
Description

The neutralizing_antibody_id variable records response to the prompt, "Unique identifier or catalog number of antibody given by supplier".
599) neutralizing_antibody_name ¶
LabelName of the antibody
Datatypestring
Description

The neutralizing_antibody_name variable records response to the prompt, "Name of the antibody".
600) neutralizing_antibody_description ¶
LabelDescription of the antibody
Datatypestring
Description

The neutralizing_antibody_description variable records response to the prompt, "Description of the antibody".
601) neutralizing_antibody_clonality ¶
LabelClonal state of the antibody
Datatypestring
Description

The neutralizing_antibody_clonality variable records response to the prompt, "Clonal state of the antibody".

Values for this variable are strings that are restricted to the list of 2 permissible string values.

Enumeration
monoclonal monoclonal
polyclonal polyclonal
602) neutralizing_antibody_clone ¶
LabelName of the antibody clone
Datatypestring
Description

The neutralizing_antibody_clone variable records response to the prompt, "Name of the antibody clone".
603) neutralizing_antibody_modification ¶
LabelName of modification attached to the antibody
Datatypestring
Description

The neutralizing_antibody_modification variable records response to the prompt, "Name of modification attached to the antibody".
604) neutralizing_antibody_modification_role ¶
LabelRole of the modification
Datatypestring
Description

The neutralizing_antibody_modification_role variable records response to the prompt, "Role of the modification".

Values for this variable are strings that are restricted to the list of 3 permissible string values.

Enumeration
capturing capturing
capturing + detection capturing + detection
detection detection
605) neutralizing_antibody_sequence ¶
LabelProtein sequence of the antibody
Datatypestring
Description

The neutralizing_antibody_sequence variable records response to the prompt, "Protein sequence of the antibody".
606) neutralizing_antibody_expression_system ¶
LabelExpression system used to express antibody
Datatypestring
Description

The neutralizing_antibody_expression_system variable records response to the prompt, "Expression system used to express antibody".

Values for this variable are strings that are restricted to the list of 4 permissible string values.

Enumeration
human-recombinant-baculovirus human-recombinant-baculovirus
human-recombinant-E.coli human-recombinant-E.coli
human-recombinant-yeast human-recombinant-yeast
human-recombinant-mamalian human-recombinant-mamalian
607) neutralizing_antibody_formulation ¶
LabelFormulation of antibody
Datatypestring
Description

The neutralizing_antibody_formulation variable records response to the prompt, "Formulation of antibody".
608) neutralizing_antibody_source ¶
LabelSupplier of the antibody or antibody conjugate or publication DOI link
Datatypestring
Description

The neutralizing_antibody_source variable records response to the prompt, "Supplier of the antibody or antibody conjugate or publication DOI link".
609) neutralizing_antibody_source_url ¶
LabelURL of supplier catalog page or publication DOI link
Datatypestring
Description

The neutralizing_antibody_source_url variable records response to the prompt, "URL of supplier catalog page or publication DOI link".
610) standard_antibody_id ¶
LabelUnique identifier or catalog number of standard antibody given by supplier
Datatypestring
Description

The standard_antibody_id variable records response to the prompt, "Unique identifier or catalog number of standard antibody given by supplier".
611) standard_antibody_name ¶
LabelName of the capture antibody
Datatypestring
Description

The standard_antibody_name variable records response to the prompt, "Name of the capture antibody".
612) standard_antibody_isotype ¶
LabelIsotype of antibody (example: IgG)
Datatypestring
Description

The standard_antibody_isotype variable records response to the prompt, "Isotype of antibody (example: IgG)".

Values for this variable are strings that are restricted to the list of 3 permissible string values.

Enumeration
IgA IgA
IgG IgG
IgM IgM
613) standard_antibody_clonality ¶
LabelClonal state of the standard antibody
Datatypestring
Description

The standard_antibody_clonality variable records response to the prompt, "Clonal state of the standard antibody".

Values for this variable are strings that are restricted to the list of 3 permissible string values.

Enumeration
monoclonal monoclonal
polyclonal polyclonal
cocktail of monoclonal antibodies cocktail of monoclonal antibodies
614) standard_antibody_clone ¶
LabelName of the antibody clone
Datatypestring
Description

The standard_antibody_clone variable records response to the prompt, "Name of the antibody clone".
615) standard_antibody_modification ¶
LabelName of modification attached to the antibody
Datatypestring
Description

The standard_antibody_modification variable records response to the prompt, "Name of modification attached to the antibody".
616) standard_antibody_sequence ¶
LabelProtein sequence of the antibody
Datatypestring
Description

The standard_antibody_sequence variable records response to the prompt, "Protein sequence of the antibody".
617) standard_antibody_expression_system ¶
LabelExpression system used to express antibody
Datatypestring
Description

The standard_antibody_expression_system variable records response to the prompt, "Expression system used to express antibody".

Values for this variable are strings that are restricted to the list of 4 permissible string values.

Enumeration
human-recombinant-baculovirus human-recombinant-baculovirus
human-recombinant-E.coli human-recombinant-E.coli
human-recombinant-yeast human-recombinant-yeast
human-recombinant-mamalian human-recombinant-mamalian
618) standard_antibody_host_organism_name ¶
LabelHost species is the animal in which the antibody was generated. (example: goat)
Datatypestring
Description

The standard_antibody_host_organism_name variable records response to the prompt, "Host species is the animal in which the antibody was generated. (example: goat)".
619) standard_antibody_host_organism_taxonomy_id ¶
LabelNCBI taxonomy id for the target organism (example: 9925)
Datatypestring
Description

The standard_antibody_host_organism_taxonomy_id variable records response to the prompt, "NCBI taxonomy id for the target organism (example: 9925)".
620) standard_antibody_host_organism_subtype ¶
LabelSubtype of target organism
Datatypestring
Description

The standard_antibody_host_organism_subtype variable records response to the prompt, "Subtype of target organism".
621) standard_antibody_purity ¶
LabelPurity of antibody in percent (may include < and > signs) (example: >95)
Datatypestring
Description

The standard_antibody_purity variable records response to the prompt, "Purity of antibody in percent (may include < and > signs) (example: >95)".
622) standard_antibody_purification_method ¶
LabelMethod used for antibody purification (example: SDS-PAGE)
Datatypestring
Description

The standard_antibody_purification_method variable records response to the prompt, "Method used for antibody purification (example: SDS-PAGE)".
623) standard_antibody_formulation ¶
LabelFormulation of antibody
Datatypestring
Description

The standard_antibody_formulation variable records response to the prompt, "Formulation of antibody".
624) standard_antibody_source ¶
LabelSupplier of the antibody or antibody conjugate or publication DOI link
Datatypestring
Description

The standard_antibody_source variable records response to the prompt, "Supplier of the antibody or antibody conjugate or publication DOI link".
625) standard_antibody_source_url ¶
LabelURL of supplier catalog page or publication DOI link (example: https://doi.org/10.1002/anie.202107730)
Datatypestring
Description

The standard_antibody_source_url variable records response to the prompt, "URL of supplier catalog page or publication DOI link (example: https://doi.org/10.1002/anie.202107730)".

Clinical7 elements

626) cohort_id ¶
LabelIdentifier for groups of patients
Datatypestring
Description

The cohort_id variable records response to the prompt, "Identifier for groups of patients".
627) date_enrolled ¶
LabelDate when patient was enrolled in the study and the samples were collected
Datatypestring
Description

The date_enrolled variable records response to the prompt, "Date when patient was enrolled in the study and the samples were collected".
628) timepoint ¶
LabelWhich timepoint does this clinical sample pertain to? (Each participant is followed for up to 12 timepoints with one week in between each timepoint. Each timepoint corresponds to a specific smell card. There are 6 unique smell cards labeled as A-F. Each participant competes A-F in order and then repeats the cycle A-F so that each card is tested twice for a complete follow up.)
Datatypestring
Description

The timepoint variable records response to the prompt, "Which timepoint does this clinical sample pertain to? (Each participant is followed for up to 12 timepoints with one week in between each timepoint. Each timepoint corresponds to a specific smell card. There are 6 unique smell cards labeled as A-F. Each participant competes A-F in order and then repeats the cycle A-F so that each card is tested twice for a complete follow up.)".
629) symptom_onset_days ¶
LabelNumber of days since the onset of symptoms when the patient's sample was collected
Datatypestring
Description

The symptom_onset_days variable records response to the prompt, "Number of days since the onset of symptoms when the patient's sample was collected".
630) days_since_first_vaccine ¶
LabelNumber of days since the first COVID vaccination when the patient's sample was collected
Datatypestring
Description

The days_since_first_vaccine variable records response to the prompt, "Number of days since the first COVID vaccination when the patient's sample was collected".
631) days_since_second_vaccine ¶
LabelNumber of days since the second COVID vaccination when the patient's sample was collected
Datatypestring
Description

The days_since_second_vaccine variable records response to the prompt, "Number of days since the second COVID vaccination when the patient's sample was collected".
632) days_since_patient_covid_positive ¶
LabelNumber of days since patient tested positive for COVID when the patient's sample was collected
Datatypestring
Description

The days_since_patient_covid_positive variable records response to the prompt, "Number of days since patient tested positive for COVID when the patient's sample was collected".

Vaccine Acceptance3 elements

633) covid_vaccine_type ¶
LabelCovid vaccine type (FDA approved vaccines)
Datatypestring
Description

The covid_vaccine_type variable records response to the prompt, "Covid vaccine type (FDA approved vaccines)".

Values for this variable are strings that are restricted to the list of 6 permissible string values.

Enumeration
Pfizer-BioNTech Pfizer-BioNTech
Moderna Moderna
Novavax Novavax
J&J/Janssen J&J/Janssen
Pfizer-BioNTech Bivalent Pfizer-BioNTech Bivalent
Moderna Bivalent Moderna Bivalent
634) covid_vaccine ¶
LabelHave you received a COVID-19 vaccine?
Datatypeinteger
Description

The covid_vaccine variable records response to the prompt, "Have you received a COVID-19 vaccine?".

Values for this variable are integers that are restricted to the list of 3 permissible integer values.

Enumeration
1 Yes
0 No
98 not sure/prefer not to answer
635) covid_vaccine_doses ¶
LabelHow many COVID-19 vaccine doses have you received? (use 0 if covid_vaccine == 0, leave blank if covid_vaccine == 98)
Datatypestring
Description

The covid_vaccine_doses variable records response to the prompt, "How many COVID-19 vaccine doses have you received? (use 0 if covid_vaccine == 0, leave blank if covid_vaccine == 98)".

Covid Testing14 elements

636) covid_test_target_disease_status ¶
LabelParticipant Testing Disease Status
Datatypeinteger
Description

The covid_test_target_disease_status variable records response to the prompt, "Participant Testing Disease Status".

Values for this variable are integers that are restricted to the list of 7 permissible integer values.

Enumeration
1 Asymptomatic
2 Pre-symptomatic illness
3 Mild/Moderate outpatient illness
4 Acute illness
5 Severe/Critical inpatient illness
6 Exposed
9 Convalescent illiness
637) covid_test_type ¶
LabelTest Method Target
Datatypeinteger
Description

The covid_test_type variable records response to the prompt, "Test Method Target".

Values for this variable are integers that are restricted to the list of 7 permissible integer values.

Enumeration
1 Antibody
2 Antigen
3 Nucleic acid/PCR
4 Nucleic acid/Isothermal
5 Molecular/host response
6 Biochemical marker (eg, pH)
90 Other, Specify
638) covid_test_type_other ¶
LabelOther method target
Datatypestring
Preconditioncovid_test_type is 90 (Other, Specify)
Description

The covid_test_type_other variable records response to the prompt, "Other method target".

This variable only records a non-blank value if the value of covid_test_type is 90, "Other, Specify".
639) covid_test_name ¶
LabelTest manufacturer (or LDT) and test name
Datatypestring
Description

The covid_test_name variable records response to the prompt, "Test manufacturer (or LDT) and test name".
640) covid_test_specimen_type ¶
LabelSpecimen Type (Added Plasma and Stool to the original RADx-UP data element.)
Datatypeinteger
Description

The covid_test_specimen_type variable records response to the prompt, "Specimen Type (Added Plasma and Stool to the original RADx-UP data element.)".

Values for this variable are integers that are restricted to the list of 11 permissible integer values.

Enumeration
1 Anterior nasal swab
2 Mid-turbinate nasal swab
3 Nasopharyngeal swab
4 Oropharyngeal swab
5 Nasal lavage
6 Saliva
7 Sputum
8 Whole blood
9 Plasma
10 Stool
90 Other, Specify
641) covid_test_specimen_type_other ¶
LabelOther specimen type
Datatypestring
Preconditioncovid_test_specimen_type is 90 (Other, Specify)
Description

The covid_test_specimen_type_other variable records response to the prompt, "Other specimen type".

This variable only records a non-blank value if the value of covid_test_specimen_type is 90, "Other, Specify".
642) covid_test_specimen_collector ¶
LabelSpecimen Collector
Datatypeinteger
Description

The covid_test_specimen_collector variable records response to the prompt, "Specimen Collector".

Values for this variable are integers that are restricted to the list of 3 permissible integer values.

Enumeration
1 Self-collect
2 Health Care Provider collected
90 Other, Specify
643) covid_test_specimen_collector_other ¶
LabelOther specimen collector
Datatypestring
Preconditioncovid_test_specimen_collector is 90 (Other, Specify)
Description

The covid_test_specimen_collector_other variable records response to the prompt, "Other specimen collector".

This variable only records a non-blank value if the value of covid_test_specimen_collector is 90, "Other, Specify".
644) covid_test_ct_value ¶
LabelPCR cycle threshold
Datatypestring
Description

The covid_test_ct_value variable records response to the prompt, "PCR cycle threshold".
645) covid_test_result_raw ¶
LabelRaw test result (if not a Positive/Negative/Failed report)
Datatypestring
Description

The covid_test_result_raw variable records response to the prompt, "Raw test result (if not a Positive/Negative/Failed report)".
646) covid_test_result ¶
LabelTest result
Datatypeinteger
Description

The covid_test_result variable records response to the prompt, "Test result".

Values for this variable are integers that are restricted to the list of 5 permissible integer values.

Enumeration
1 Positive
2 Negative
3 Failed
4 Lost
90 Other
647) covid_test_result_other ¶
LabelOther test result
Datatypestring
Preconditioncovid_test_result is 90 (Other)
Description

The covid_test_result_other variable records response to the prompt, "Other test result".

This variable only records a non-blank value if the value of covid_test_result is 90, "Other".
648) covid_test_result_other_unit ¶
LabelUnit of other test result if applicable
Datatypestring
Description

The covid_test_result_other_unit variable records response to the prompt, "Unit of other test result if applicable".
649) covid_diagnosis ¶
LabelHave you ever been diagnosed with COVID-19?
Datatypeinteger
Description

The covid_diagnosis variable records response to the prompt, "Have you ever been diagnosed with COVID-19?".

Values for this variable are integers that are restricted to the list of 3 permissible integer values.

Enumeration
1 Yes
0 No
98 not sure/prefer not to answer

Collection Site7 elements

654) state_names ¶
LabelA pipe "|" separated list of US state names. (Use the list of US state names from the US Census: https://www2.census.gov/programs-surveys/popest/geographies/2018/all-geocodes-v2018.xlsx)
Datatypestring
Description

The state_names variable records response to the prompt, "A pipe "|" separated list of US state names. (Use the list of US state names from the US Census: https://www2.census.gov/programs-surveys/popest/geographies/2018/all-geocodes-v2018.xlsx)".
655) county_names ¶
LabelA pipe "|" separated list of names of all counties served by this sampling site (i.e., served by this wastewater treatment plant or, if 'sample_location' is "upstream", then by this upstream location) (Use the county names from the US Census: https://www2.census.gov/programs-surveys/popest/geographies/2018/all-geocodes-v2018.xlsx)
Datatypestring
Description

The county_names variable records response to the prompt, "A pipe "|" separated list of names of all counties served by this sampling site (i.e., served by this wastewater treatment plant or, if 'sample_location' is "upstream", then by this upstream location) (Use the county names from the US Census: https://www2.census.gov/programs-surveys/popest/geographies/2018/all-geocodes-v2018.xlsx)".
656) county_fips ¶
LabelA pipe "|" separated list of the FIPS codes for US counties. This is a 5-digit number consisting of the 2-digit state code followed by the 3-digit county code. (Concatenate the 2-digit state code and the 3-digit county code from the US Census. Example California (06) + San Diego County (073) -> 06073 https://www2.census.gov/programs-surveys/popest/geographies/2018/all-geocodes-v2018.xlsx)
Datatypestring
Description

The county_fips variable records response to the prompt, "A pipe "|" separated list of the FIPS codes for US counties. This is a 5-digit number consisting of the 2-digit state code followed by the 3-digit county code. (Concatenate the 2-digit state code and the 3-digit county code from the US Census. Example California (06) + San Diego County (073) -> 06073 https://www2.census.gov/programs-surveys/popest/geographies/2018/all-geocodes-v2018.xlsx)".
657) zipcode ¶
LabelZIP code in which this sampling site is located
Datatypestring
Description

The zipcode variable records response to the prompt, "ZIP code in which this sampling site is located".
658) sample_location ¶
LabelSample collection location in the wastewater system, whether at a wastewater treatment plant (or other community level treatment infrastructure such as community-scale septic) or upstream in the wastewater system (wwtp, A sampling location at a wastewater treatment plant or other community-scale treatment infrastructure specified in 'wwtp_name' | upstream, A sampling location other than 'wwtp'. If 'sample_location' is "upstream", specify in 'sample_location_specify')
Datatypestring
Description

The sample_location variable records response to the prompt, "Sample collection location in the wastewater system, whether at a wastewater treatment plant (or other community level treatment infrastructure such as community-scale septic) or upstream in the wastewater system (wwtp, A sampling location at a wastewater treatment plant or other community-scale treatment infrastructure specified in 'wwtp_name' | upstream, A sampling location other than 'wwtp'. If 'sample_location' is "upstream", specify in 'sample_location_specify')".
659) sample_location_specify ¶
LabelIf 'sample_location' is "upstream", specify the collection location in the wastewater system; an arbitrary name may be used if you do not wish to disclose the real name. ([string, length less than or equal to 40 characters]; [empty], If sample_location is "upstream", then this must have a non-empty value)
Datatypestring
Description

The sample_location_specify variable records response to the prompt, "If 'sample_location' is "upstream", specify the collection location in the wastewater system; an arbitrary name may be used if you do not wish to disclose the real name. ([string, length less than or equal to 40 characters]; [empty], If sample_location is "upstream", then this must have a non-empty value)".

This variable only records a non-blank value if the condition [sample_location] = 'upstream' evaluates to true.
660) institution_type ¶
LabelIf this sample represents wastewater from a single institution, facility, or building, specify the institution type; otherwise, specify "not institution specific"
Datatypestring
Description

The institution_type variable records response to the prompt, "If this sample represents wastewater from a single institution, facility, or building, specify the institution type; otherwise, specify "not institution specific"".

Values for this variable are strings that are restricted to the list of 15 permissible string values.

Enumeration
not institution specific not institution specific
correctional correctional
long term care - nursing home long term care - nursing home
long term care - assisted living long term care - assisted living
other long term care other long term care
short stay acute care hospital short stay acute care hospital
long term acute care hospital long term acute care hospital
child day care child day care
k12 k12
higher ed dorm higher ed dorm
higher ed other higher ed other
social services shelter social services shelter
other residential building other residential building
ship ship
airplane airplane

WWTP7 elements

661) epaid ¶
LabelNPDES permit number for the wastewater treatment plant specified in 'wwtp_name' (NPDES permit number (<2-letter abbreviation><#######>))
Datatypestring
Description

The epaid variable records response to the prompt, "NPDES permit number for the wastewater treatment plant specified in 'wwtp_name' (NPDES permit number (<2-letter abbreviation><#######>))".
662) wwtp_name ¶
LabelThe name of the Wastewater Treatment Plant (WWTP) to which this wastewater flows. If this wastewater does not flow to a WWTP, specify an identifiable name for the septic or other treatment system to which this wastewater flows. An arbitrary name may be used if you do not wish to disclose the real name. ([string, length less than or equal to 40 characters])
Datatypestring
Description

The wwtp_name variable records response to the prompt, "The name of the Wastewater Treatment Plant (WWTP) to which this wastewater flows. If this wastewater does not flow to a WWTP, specify an identifiable name for the septic or other treatment system to which this wastewater flows. An arbitrary name may be used if you do not wish to disclose the real name. ([string, length less than or equal to 40 characters])".
663) wwtp_jurisdiction ¶
LabelState, DC, US territory, or Freely Associated State jurisdiction name (2-letter abbreviation) in which the wastewater treatment plant provided in 'wwtp_name' is located
Datatypestring
Description

The wwtp_jurisdiction variable records response to the prompt, "State, DC, US territory, or Freely Associated State jurisdiction name (2-letter abbreviation) in which the wastewater treatment plant provided in 'wwtp_name' is located".

Values for this variable are strings that are restricted to the list of 64 permissible string values.

Enumeration
AL Alabama
AK Alaska
AS American Samoa
AZ Arizona
AR Arkansas
CA California
CI Chicago, IL
CO Colorado
MP Commonwealth of Northern Mariana Islands
CT Connecticut
DE Delaware
DC District of Columbia
FM Federated States of Micronesia
FL Florida
GA Georgia
GU Guam
HI Hawaii
HO Houston, TX
ID Idaho
IL Illinois
IN Indiana
IA Iowa
KS Kansas
KY Kentucky
LC Los Angeles County, CA
LA Louisiana
ME Maine
MD Maryland
MA Massachusetts
MI Michigan
MN Minnesota
MS Mississippi
MO Missouri
MT Montana
NE Nebraska
NV Nevada
NH New Hampshire
NJ New Jersey
NM New Mexico
NY New York
NZ New York City, NY
NC North Carolina
ND North Dakota
OH Ohio
OK Oklahoma
OR Oregon
PA Pennsylvania
PH Philadelphia, PA
PR Puerto Rico
MH Republic of the Marshall Islands
PW Republic of Palau
RI Rhode Island
SC South Carolina
SD South Dakota
TN Tennessee
TX Texas
VI U.S. Virgin Islands
UT Utah
VT Vermont
VA Virginia
WA Washington
WV West Virginia
WI Wisconsin
WY Wyoming
664) capacity_mgd ¶
LabelWastewater treatment plant design capacity
Datatypestring
Description

The capacity_mgd variable records response to the prompt, "Wastewater treatment plant design capacity".
665) industrial_input ¶
LabelApproximate average percentage of wastewater from industrial sources that is received by the wastewater treatment plant specified in 'wwtp_name'
Datatypestring
Description

The industrial_input variable records response to the prompt, "Approximate average percentage of wastewater from industrial sources that is received by the wastewater treatment plant specified in 'wwtp_name'".
666) stormwater_input ¶
LabelDoes the wastewater treatment plant specified in 'wwtp_name' treat water from a combined sewer system (i.e., a sewer system that collects both sewage and stormwater)?
Datatypestring
Description

The stormwater_input variable records response to the prompt, "Does the wastewater treatment plant specified in 'wwtp_name' treat water from a combined sewer system (i.e., a sewer system that collects both sewage and stormwater)?".

Values for this variable are strings that are restricted to the list of 2 permissible string values.

Enumeration
Yes Yes
No No
667) influent_equilibrated ¶
LabelIs influent to the wastewater treatment plant specified in 'wwtp_name' ever stored prior to treatment to equilibrate or modulate the influent flow rate?
Datatypestring
Description

The influent_equilibrated variable records response to the prompt, "Is influent to the wastewater treatment plant specified in 'wwtp_name' ever stored prior to treatment to equilibrate or modulate the influent flow rate?".

Values for this variable are strings that are restricted to the list of 2 permissible string values.

Enumeration
Yes Yes
No No

Collection Method7 elements

668) sample_type ¶
LabelType of sample collected, whether grab or composite. If composite, also provide the duration of sampling and type of composite, as listed in the Value Set (e.g., "24-hr flow-weighted composite"). A grab sample is defined as an individual sample collected without compositing or adding other samples, regardless of whether the sample matrix is liquid wastewater or sludge. (Added composite air and passive)
Datatypestring
Description

The sample_type variable records response to the prompt, "Type of sample collected, whether grab or composite. If composite, also provide the duration of sampling and type of composite, as listed in the Value Set (e.g., "24-hr flow-weighted composite"). A grab sample is defined as an individual sample collected without compositing or adding other samples, regardless of whether the sample matrix is liquid wastewater or sludge. (Added composite air and passive)".

Values for this variable are strings that are restricted to the list of 19 permissible string values.

Enumeration
24-hr flow-weighted composite 24-hr flow-weighted composite
12-hr flow-weighted composite 12-hr flow-weighted composite
8-hr flow-weighted composite 8-hr flow-weighted composite
6-hr flow-weighted composite 6-hr flow-weighted composite
3-hr flow-weighted composite 3-hr flow-weighted composite
24-hr time-weighted composite 24-hr time-weighted composite
12-hr time-weighted composite 12-hr time-weighted composite
8-hr time-weighted composite 8-hr time-weighted composite
6-hr time-weighted composite 6-hr time-weighted composite
3-hr time-weighted composite 3-hr time-weighted composite
24-hr manual composite 24-hr manual composite
12-hr manual composite 12-hr manual composite
8-hr manual composite 8-hr manual composite
6-hr manual composite 6-hr manual composite
3-hr manual composite 3-hr manual composite
grab grab
composite composite
air air
passive passive
669) composite_freq ¶
LabelFrequency of sub-sample collection (for composite samples only): for flow-weighted, the number of sub-samples collected per million gallons of flow; for time-weighted, the number of sub-samples per hour. Flow-weighted example: a value of 5 would indicate 5 sub-samples per million gallons, or 1 sub-sample per 200,000 gallons (If flow-weighted composite: number per million gallons; if time-weighted or manual composite: number per hour)
Datatypestring
Description

The composite_freq variable records response to the prompt, "Frequency of sub-sample collection (for composite samples only): for flow-weighted, the number of sub-samples collected per million gallons of flow; for time-weighted, the number of sub-samples per hour. Flow-weighted example: a value of 5 would indicate 5 sub-samples per million gallons, or 1 sub-sample per 200,000 gallons (If flow-weighted composite: number per million gallons; if time-weighted or manual composite: number per hour)".
670) sample_matrix ¶
LabelWastewater matrix from which the sample was collected
Datatypestring
Description

The sample_matrix variable records response to the prompt, "Wastewater matrix from which the sample was collected".
671) collection_storage_time ¶
LabelDuration of time the sample was stored after collection and prior to reaching the lab
Datatypestring
Description

The collection_storage_time variable records response to the prompt, "Duration of time the sample was stored after collection and prior to reaching the lab".
672) collection_storage_temp ¶
LabelTemperature at which the sample was stored after collection and prior to reaching the lab
Datatypestring
Description

The collection_storage_temp variable records response to the prompt, "Temperature at which the sample was stored after collection and prior to reaching the lab".
673) pretreatment ¶
LabelWas the sample treated with any chemicals prior to reaching the lab (for example, addition of stabilizers)?
Datatypestring
Description

The pretreatment variable records response to the prompt, "Was the sample treated with any chemicals prior to reaching the lab (for example, addition of stabilizers)?".

Values for this variable are strings that are restricted to the list of 2 permissible string values.

Enumeration
Yes Yes
No No
674) pretreatment_specify ¶
LabelIf 'pretreatment' is "yes", then specify the chemicals used
Datatypestring
Description

The pretreatment_specify variable records response to the prompt, "If 'pretreatment' is "yes", then specify the chemicals used".

This variable only records a non-blank value if the condition [pretreatment] = 'Yes' evaluates to true.

Processing Method13 elements

702) solids_separation ¶
LabelProcess used to separate solid and liquid phases of the sample, either prior to or in the absence of the concentration method specified in 'concentration_method'
Datatypestring
Description

The solids_separation variable records response to the prompt, "Process used to separate solid and liquid phases of the sample, either prior to or in the absence of the concentration method specified in 'concentration_method'".

Values for this variable are strings that are restricted to the list of 3 permissible string values.

Enumeration
filtration filtration
centrifugation centrifugation
none none
703) concentration_method ¶
LabelMethod used to concentrate the sample prior to analysis of the concentrate
Datatypestring
Description

The concentration_method variable records response to the prompt, "Method used to concentrate the sample prior to analysis of the concentrate".

Values for this variable are strings that are restricted to the list of 13 permissible string values.

Enumeration
membrane filtration with addition of mgcl2 membrane filtration with addition of mgcl2
membrane filtration with sample acidification membrane filtration with sample acidification
membrane filtration with acidification and mgcl2 membrane filtration with acidification and mgcl2
membrane filtration with no amendment membrane filtration with no amendment
peg precipitation peg precipitation
ultracentrifugation ultracentrifugation
skimmed milk flocculation skimmed milk flocculation
beef extract flocculation beef extract flocculation
promega wastewater large volume tna capture kit promega wastewater large volume tna capture kit
centricon ultrafiltration centricon ultrafiltration
amicon ultrafiltration amicon ultrafiltration
hollow fiber dead end ultrafiltration hollow fiber dead end ultrafiltration
none none
704) extraction_method ¶
LabelMethod used for nucleic acid extraction from the sample (Added silica adsorption)
Datatypestring
Description

The extraction_method variable records response to the prompt, "Method used for nucleic acid extraction from the sample (Added silica adsorption)".

Values for this variable are strings that are restricted to the list of 14 permissible string values.

Enumeration
qiagen allprep powerviral dna/rna kit qiagen allprep powerviral dna/rna kit
qiagen allprep powerfecal dna/rna kit qiagen allprep powerfecal dna/rna kit
qiange allprep dna/rna kit qiange allprep dna/rna kit
qiagen rneasy powermicrobiome kit qiagen rneasy powermicrobiome kit
qiagen powerwater kit qiagen powerwater kit
qiagen rneasy kit qiagen rneasy kit
promega ht tna kit promega ht tna kit
promega automated tna kit promega automated tna kit
promega manual tna kit promega manual tna kit
promega wastewater large volume tna capture kit promega wastewater large volume tna capture kit
nuclisens automated magnetic bead extraction kit nuclisens automated magnetic bead extraction kit
nuclisens manual magnetic bead extraction kit nuclisens manual magnetic bead extraction kit
phenol chloroform phenol chloroform
silica adsorption silica adsorption
705) pre_conc_storage_time ¶
